                +[  Process  ]---------------------------------------+
                |                                                    |
                |                       +----------+                 |
                |                   +-->|  Path 1  +-+               |
+---------+     |  +---------+      |   +----------+ |    +-------+  |     +----------+
|  Input  +------->|  Start  +------+                +--->|  End  +------->|  Output  |
+---------+     |  +---------+      |   +----------+ |    +-------+  |     +----------+
                |                   +-->|  Path 2  +-+               |
                |                       +----------+                 |
                |                                                    |
                |                                                    |
                |                                                    |
                +----------------------------------------------------+
